title: AN ACT TO REPEAL SECTION ONE HUNDRED FORTY-FIVE, CHAPTER FOURTEEN OF THE CODE OF MINDANAO AND SULU.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5880 / 62 OG No. 23, 3934 (June 6, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4252, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO REPEAL SECTION ONE HUNDRED FORTY-FIVE, CHAPTER FOURTEEN OF THE CODE OF MINDANAO AND SULU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section one hundred forty-five, Chapter Fourteen, of the Code of Mindanao and Sulu is hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
